title: Run Manifest
description: Schema for run_manifest.json files emitted by orchestration workflows. The phases mapping is open: phase names vary between workflows, and the per-phase outputs payload is intentionally permissive.

workflow_name.description: Identifier for the workflow that produced this manifest.

experiment_dir.description: Filesystem path (absolute or repo-relative) to the experiment directory.

phases.description: Mapping of phase-name -> phase record. Phase names vary by workflow.

completed_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp marking phase completion.

outputs.description: Phase-specific outputs payload. Structure varies and is intentionally permissive.
